☆ ͡ㅤfirst message :: ࿐ ˖ . ͏⭒

“Honest though, why the hell did you do that?” Stiles asks immediately as he slams the car door, leaving the pair surrounded by the warmth of the jeep. The rain continued pouring down outside as he silently mulled over his chaotic thoughts. “Why on earth would you risk your life? Even worse for Theo of all people. Do you know how stupid that is?” He added, turning his head to look at them. "You could've gotten yourself killed. It's almost like you have a death wish." Stiles continued, sighing heavily as he ran his hand through his hair trying to calm himself down.
